_comment: Three ways to launch the server. Pick ONE and copy that block into your client config (cursor-mcp.json, claude-desktop-config.json, etc.). Listed here side-by-side for easy comparison; clients won't load this file directly.

_variant_1_npx._doc: No install required. Recommended for most users. The first run downloads the package; subsequent runs are cached by npm.

_variant_2_global_install._doc: Install once with `npm install -g @prism.enterprises/adaptive-reasoning-server` and call the binary directly. Faster startup, no npx network check, version pinned to whatever you installed. On Windows the binary is `adaptive-reasoning-server.cmd` but `command: "adaptive-reasoning-server"` resolves it correctly.

_variant_3_local_clone._doc: Run from a local clone for development. Use the absolute path to the built dist/index.js. Run `npm install && npm run build` in the cloned repo first.

_variant_3b_local_clone_windows._doc: Same as variant 3 but with a Windows path. JSON requires either forward slashes or escaped backslashes.
